name: Superdreadnought Rail Cannon Gustav Rocket
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>弩</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ど</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>級</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>砲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>塔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>列</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>車</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>グスタフ・ロケット
name_jp_tl: Superdreadnought Gun Turret Train Gustav Rocket
desc:
3 Level 10 monsters
Once per turn, you can also Xyz Summon "Superdreadnought Rail Cannon Gustav Rocket" by discarding 1 card and using "Superdreadnought Rail Cannon Gustav Max" you control (transfer its materials to this card). When your opponent activates a monster effect while this card has material (Quick Effect): You can negate that effect, and if you do, destroy that monster, then inflict 1000 damage to your opponent. You can only use this effect of "Superdreadnought Rail Cannon Gustav Rocket" once per turn. Once per turn, during your End Phase: Detach 1 material from this card or destroy it.

action: Applies effects if Xyz Material is attached
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
